tracks.rawText: 3:15Many Rhytms One Sound [2313664106]v5.5CoverFunk-pop with disco influences, Features a clean, rhythmic electric guitar playing syncopated 16th-note scratches and palm-muted riffs, A prominent slap bass guitar follows the kick drum patterns, The drum kit uses a tight, dry snare and a consistent eighth-note hi-hat pattern, A bright, soulful male tenor vocal leads with frequent use of falsetto ad-libs, Occasional brass stabs and a subtle synth pad provide harmonic depth, The tempo is 118 BPM in the key of G major, The arrangement features a breakdown with a wah-wah guitar solo and a rhythmic bridge focusing on the bass and percussion1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Many Rhytms One Sound [2313664106]

tracks.rawText: 2:13Tarnished Pulsev5.5Fractured dark industrial trap at 140 BPM with detuned sub pulses, glitchy percussion, metallic hits, and ominous minor-key synth drones, Broken drum edits, reverse reverb stabs, tape-stop transitions, and overdriven 808s create constant instability, while sparse piano fragments and distorted bass duck in and out, always on the edge of collapse4PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:27Filterfruit Metonymyv5.5Hypnotic LSD-inflected psych-电子 trance with off-kilter triplet percussion, warped kick patterns, and detuned synth arpeggios fighting the bar line, Acid squelch through resonant low-pass filters, smeared tape-delay echoes, granular vocal fragments, and woozy bass pulses create a disorienting, kaleidoscopic groove4PublishRemix
